default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss team changes, content strategy, and upcoming events.](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team restructure: Dave shifted to SEO/AEO focus, Megan joins as associate director for strategy](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [SchoolAI content performing well in LLMs, with strong impressions despite industry-wide click challenges](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [SchoolAI gearing up for major presence at ISTE conference with innovative marketing tactics](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [New SchoolAI website launch imminent, featuring updated modern design](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Team Updates

  - [Dave shifted to focus solely on SEO, AEO, and LLM search across teams](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Megan joined as associate director, focusing on strategy and client work](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Deya left for grad school; new content managers already trained and integrated](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Overall site traffic down (summer slump), but blog content continues to climb](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Impressions growing exponentially; clicks recovering but not at April peak](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Strong performance in LLMs, particularly for niche, specific topics](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [Top performing topics: AI for math, formative/summative assessment](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Strategy shifts:](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
      - [Focus on positive metrics beyond clicks due to AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Optimize meta titles/descriptions for high-impression, low-click posts](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
      - [Consider merging closely aligned topics to consolidate traffic](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)

### SchoolAI Marketing Initiatives

  - [ISTE Conference (starts tomorrow):](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

      - [Branded pedicabs, digital screen ads, TV/audio advertising](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
      - [Creative airport welcome campaign with luggage tags](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [New website launch:](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
      - [Modern, energetic design positioning SchoolAI as enterprise-level software](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
      - [Launch expected within hours, pending final touches](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)

### SchoolAI Branded Bus

  - [Two-section interior: demo area with bar-height table, podcast recording space](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)

### Upcoming Events

  - [ISTE Conference: June 25-28 (team attending)](https://fathom.video/share/JJVProhp1zRW8vruy9PK7MmVqQerNt9s?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

## Next Steps
